list.title: Users
list.subtitle: The people in your organization.
list.selectAllLabel: Select all users on this page

byoi.title: Users and roles are managed locally
byoi.description: You're signing in with your own identity provider, so changes here are not synced to it. Create, disable and assign roles to accounts in your IdP; lazyit keeps its own copy for authorization.

empty.title: No people here yet
empty.description: Add the people in your organization — once they're here you can assign assets and grant them access.

detail.notFoundDescription: They may have been offboarded, or the API is unreachable.

articles.title: Authored articles
articles.empty: Has not authored any knowledge base articles.

form.createDescription: Add a person to the organization. New users start active.
form.emailHelp: The account-linking key for the identity provider. Must be unique; a change is mirrored to the IdP.
form.legajoHelp: Optional. The employee/file number from payroll or HR. Must be unique among active users.
form.usernameHelp: Optional directory handle, distinct from the email. Not a login credential. Must be unique among active users.

manager.label: Manager
manager.help: Optional. Either a lazyit user or a free-text name — not both.

form.activeHelp: Inactive users are kept for history but treated as offboarded — they can no longer be assigned assets.

clone.title: Clone {name}
clone.description: Create a new user mirroring this person's access. Pick which assets and applications carry over.
clone.emailHelp: A fresh, unique address for the new user — never the source's.

assets.empty: This person holds no assets to carry over.

access.empty: This person has no active application access to carry over.

fire.label: Provision the new user in these applications
fire.help: Off by default: cloned access is recorded only. Turn on to run the provisioning workflows.
fire.warning: This will attempt to provision {count, plural, =1 {# application} other {# applications}} for the new user.

result.skippedTitle: {count, plural, =1 {# item was skipped} other {# items were skipped}}

reasons.not_found: No longer an active row of the source
reasons.already_in_state: Already carried over for this asset

hints.MEMBER: Normal inventory, KB and asset operations.

passwordReset.disabledNoIdp: This account has no identity-provider link, so password reset is managed by your identity provider.
passwordReset.disabledInactive: This user is inactive — reactivate them before sending a password reset.
passwordReset.confirmBody: Your identity provider will email {email} a link to reset their password. lazyit never sees or sets the password; delivery depends on the provider's SMTP being configured.

toast.sentTitle: Password reset email sent via the identity provider
toast.sentDescription: Delivery depends on your identity provider's SMTP being configured.
toast.managedTitle: Password reset is managed by your identity provider
toast.managedDescription: lazyit can't drive a reset for this account — manage the password in your IdP.
toast.inactiveDescription: Reactivate them before sending a password reset.

offboarding.title: Offboard {name}
offboarding.doneSubtitle: Access revoked, assets released — history is safe.
offboarding.notInCatalog: Not in the catalog — verify by id {id}
offboarding.emptyNote: This person holds no assets and has no active access. The act is still valid as a record of their departure.
offboarding.handoverPlaceholder: A short note printed on the return act…
offboarding.handoverHelp: Saved for next time — this note pre-fills every act.
offboarding.printedActHelp: These apply to the printed act — this summary always shows the full impact.
offboarding.signatureHelp: Signed on paper at handover — print the act below.

toast.archived: User archived — access revoked, history is safe.

act.loadError: This user could not be loaded — they may have been removed, or the API is unreachable.
act.titleEs: Acta de baja y devolución de activos
act.notInCatalog: Not in catalog — verify by id {id}
act.emptyNote: This person held no assets and had no active access. This act stands as a record of their departure.
act.statusCaption: Pending — to be completed at handover.
